findings.description: The default value for `htmlChecker` in the source includes the note 'クラスには htmlCheckerConfig で設定した設定ファイルが適用される' (i.e., the htmlCheckerConfig settings file is applied to the default class). The knowledge file omits this detail, which explains the functional relationship between `htmlChecker` and `htmlCheckerConfig`.
findings.source_evidence: Source table default column for htmlChecker: 'nablarch.test.tool.htmlcheck.Html4HtmlChecker クラスのインスタンス。クラスには htmlCheckerConfig で設定した設定ファイルが適用される。'

findings.description: `ApplicationException` is referenced in the source as the exception type stored via `exceptionRequestVarKey`, but this class name is not included in the s1 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source table description for exceptionRequestVarKey: 'ApplicationExceptionが格納されるリクエストスコープのキー'
